name: JP Counterparty / Invoice Check
description: Verify that counterparty names, invoice registration numbers, and corporate numbers are consistent across payment records and Japanese tax compliance requirements.

status.note: This is a specification draft for market testing. Do not call this endpoint.

use_cases.description: Before executing x402/USDC/JPYC payment, verify that counterparty name, corporate number, and invoice registration number are consistent
use_cases.timing: After budget approval, before payment execution

use_cases.description: After payment completion, verify that payment destination matches invoice recipient and evidence is sufficient for audit
use_cases.timing: After payment, before monthly evidence pack creation

use_cases.description: Before converting payment records to monthly evidence pack, confirm counterparty and invoice data are audit-ready
Verify that multiple payments to the same counterparty use consistent name/number/invoice data across transactions
Identify when payment recipient name or corporate registration changes, flag for human review before processing
Gather audit-ready evidence of counterparty verification for Japanese compliance and regulatory reporting

constraints.note: This API only verifies name/number consistency. It does not make tax, legal, or financial decisions.

relationships.flow: agent-budget-guard → JP Counterparty / Invoice Check → payment execution → JP Payment Evidence Guard → agent-memory-api → JP Monthly Evidence Pack

warnings: Do not call this endpoint. It is not yet available.
This API does not provide tax advice or legal advice.
This API does not determine eligibility for input tax credit (仕入税額控除).
This API does not perform credit checks on counterparties.
This API does not execute payments directly.
Verification results must be reviewed by humans for high-risk or unusual transactions.
Use this API for verification and routing only. Do not treat verification as approval for unrestricted payment execution.

applicable_regulations: 適格請求書等保存方式（インボイス制度）
法人番号公表システム
japanese_context.compliance_scope: Payment recipient verification and audit evidence for Japanese monthly reporting
japanese_context.note: This API is designed for Japanese compliance requirements but does not replace tax professional consultation.

v0_1_limitations.real_time_api_integration: Planned for v0.2+ (not available in v0.1)

v0_2_roadmap: National Tax Agency Invoice Registration System Web-API integration
National Tax Agency Corporate Number Web-API integration
Error codes and detailed validation errors
Performance optimization for high-volume batch checking

implementation_plan.step_5: Decision on implementation approach (Option A: add to existing stack / Option B: merge with payment evidence guard / Option C: release as standalone API)
